Jelly Shift Obstacle Course

Navigate a continuously moving jelly character through an obstacle course by shifting its height to match gaps. Collect diamonds, avoid collisions, and trigger Jelly Fever by passing obstacles consecutively for speed boosts. Progress through levels with increasing difficulty and unlock new jelly skins with collected diamonds.

W / Up Arrow: Shift jelly to TALL height
S / Down Arrow: Shift jelly to FLAT height

Jelly Shift Obstacle Course

Navigate a continuously moving jelly character through an obstacle course by shifting its height to match gaps. Collect diamonds, avoid collisions, and trigger Jelly Fever by passing obstacles consecutively for speed boosts. Progress through levels with increasing difficulty and unlock new jelly skins with collected diamonds.

W / Up Arrow: Shift jelly to TALL height
S / Down Arrow: Shift jelly to FLAT height
(No key): Default MEDIUM height
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic obstacle navigation and height shifting mechanics. This test verifies that the jelly can successfully shift between all three height states (tall, medium, flat) and that these shifts correctly allow passage through corresponding obstacle gaps.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated player will randomly shift between tall, medium, and flat states every 0.5-1.5 seconds while moving forward. This ensures all height states are tested and that the collision detection system properly identifies valid passages through obstacles.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the jelly demonstrates all three height states, successfully passes through at least 5 obstacles by matching the correct height, and the collision system properly detects mismatches. The game should run for at least 30 seconds without errors.
